title: Reframe README around working demo radar

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Preparing a README rewrite focused on the proven HDFS demo path, including raw-log snippets, radar framing, and temporal/weight signal interpretation. Also adding a demo-time control so historical logs can still show meaningful recency states.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed README reframing around the working HDFS demo narrative. Added raw log examples, radar framing, and concrete signal language (weight/temporal). Added --anchor-now support in the HDFS subset script so old logs can be shifted to a demo clock for meaningful recency signals. Updated output assertions and verified with pytest + behave.
